JSON file mapping Chinese characters for months to their Unicode code points.

# Purpose
This JSON file defines a set of Chinese characters and their corresponding Unicode code points. The `characters` key contains a string of Chinese characters, while the `codepoints` key provides an array of integers representing the Unicode code points for each character in the string. This structure allows for mapping between the characters and their Unicode representations.
